title: IP Rings
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/ip-rings-ltd/62719470 IP Rings Ltd is an India-based automotive component manufacturer and a member of the Amalgamations Group, founded in 1991. The company specializes in producing piston rings, high-precision forgings, and crank pins using advanced orbital cold forming technology. It is a publicly traded corporation with over 500 employees, serving global clients with cutting-edge surface treatments and high-quality parts
